Sections.Name: General
Sections.Description: General settings for the Travel Dashboard.

Keys.Name: ToggleKey
Keys.Description: The hotkey used to open the Travel Dashboard window.

Keys.Name: ShowRelevantQuestLocations
Keys.Description: Display locations related to your active quests in the dashboard.

Keys.Name: ShowFavoriteLocations
Keys.Description: Display your personal list of favorite locations in the dashboard.
